jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Evok
jsonLd.description:
We at Evok are looking for an experienced Visual Merchandiser based out of Ludhiana. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Evok:
Evok is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Evok!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
